## Build Stage

What part of the build are you on?

- Power
- First boot
- E-ink
- Audio
- Camera
- ESP32 co-processor
- Enclosure
- Other:

## Hardware Used

List the exact boards, modules, and substitutions you are using.

## Wiring

Describe your wiring and include photos if possible. Clear overhead photos of
the full prototype and close-ups of the failing subsystem are most useful.

## Serial Output

Paste relevant boot logs or application logs.

```text

```

## Measurements

If you have a multimeter or logic analyzer, include voltage readings, continuity
checks, or captured signals.

## What You Tried

List the tests you have already run and what changed after each one.
